title: triticum orientale var. lasianthum
intro: Triticum orientale var. lasianthum, also known as Oriental wheat grass or Triticum aestivum var. lasanum, is a type of grass in the Poaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress, promoting digestive health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Triticum orientale var. lasianthum include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
